current.headline: Arsenal poised to make Guimaraes offer after talks
current.summary: Arsenal are poised to make an offer for Newcastle's Bruno Guimaraes after exploratory talks over potential moves for the Brazil midfielder and team-mate Sandro Tonali.

items.headline: Four clubs who could sign Newcastle's Sandro Tonali this summer with Tottenham leading Arsenal in race
items.summary: Sandro Tonali may not be at this summer's World Cup, after Italy sensationally didn't qualify, but that hasn't stopped the Newcastle midfielder dominating the headlines. Many clubs are thought to...

items.headline: Arsenal verbal offer for Newcastle's Bruno Guimarães rejected as Gunners hunt for midfield additions
items.summary: Premier League champions Arsenal have reportedly made a verbal offer to Newcastle United to try to sign midfielder Bruno Guimarães this summer. The proposal was thought to be worth around...

items.headline: Arsenal keen on Guimaraes move - Friday's gossip
items.summary: Newcastle midfielders Sandro Tonali and Bruno Guimaraes are in demand, Chelsea want Maxence Lacroix and Liverpool still chase Yan Diomande.
